title: Final Mini Web App
summary: Build a small web app that combines HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
studentInstructions: Build a mini app with at least three sections or screens.
Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript in separate files.
Include at least five meaningful interactions.
Include a short README.md explaining the app.

rubric.description: The app works and meets the interaction requirements.
The app has a coherent, usable interface.
Files and code are organized clearly.
The app works across different screen widths.
The project shows thoughtful original design choices.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Check required files before grading quality.
Write output only to the assigned ai_output directory.
